observed_outcome.main_failure_remaining: policy collapses to early failure on all trajectories

failure_repair_outcome.failure_before: only partial_progress and ambiguous trajectories, no success-like; penalties heavily discouraged landing
failure_repair_outcome.repair_attempt: made terminal bonus more attainable, reduced terminal_penalty and stability penalties
failure_repair_outcome.outcome_after: all trajectories became early_failure; no progress made toward pad

lesson: Reducing penalties and making terminal bonus more attainable can inadvertently cause early failure on all trajectories if the reward signal becomes too lenient or misaligned; preserving approach components alone is insufficient if the policy never learns to avoid early crashes.
future_guidance: consider rollback to elite parent if next round shows regression
ensure mutation does not eliminate the penalty structure that discourages early crashes
test candidate on fresh trajectories before full training
preserve early_approach but ensure speed_penalty remains as a deterrent for crashing

archive_update.reason: Selected candidate produced all early_failure trajectories; not added to elite but used as parent for next round due to no rollback triggered.

uncertainties: No success_like trajectories exist, so success-level preference cannot be constructed
Label margin insufficient; partial progress labels not reliable for preference
Training return improved but behavior degraded; cannot attribute causality confidently
